testcase.name: account-statement: 95th percentile of response time is less than or equal to 3000.0
testcase.system-out: account-statement: 95th percentile of response time is less than or equal to 3000.0

testcase.name: Global: percentage of failed events is less than or equal to 1.0
testcase.system-out: Global: percentage of failed events is less than or equal to 1.0
